transcription.text: Is that you? Struggling to figure out what to cook or order today? Why don't you let Delicate take care of that? Fresh, healthy meals delivered right to your door, perfectly tailored to your diet and fitness goals. Here's how it works. Place your order and customize your plan exactly as you need. Select your meals or switch up the pre-selected ones as you like. They prepare your meals and you get them delivered fresh to your door daily. No effort, no hassle. How easy can it be? No more daily cooking or food delivery struggles. You're set for the whole week. Ready to try?
